active_runtimes.notes: Google ML Kit Korean Text Recognition runs fully on-device after model download.
On-device image labeling for quick local inspection and categorization.
Lightweight linear keyword-vector classifier executed through TensorFlow Lite Interpreter on-device. Safe fallback to heuristics if init fails.
Receipt OCR history, threat scan logs, imported media insights and MediaStore snapshots are persisted locally.
Indexes recent device images with screenshot/receipt/document heuristics.
Provides runtime permission guidance, app-settings deep link and spam engine mode switching UI.
Shows TFLite readiness, DB row counts, per-DB purge, JSON snapshot export and FileProvider based share actions with snackbar/toast feedback.
Runtime selection cards and Clean Guard engine state surface selected/status/fallback badges for quicker QA diagnostics.

Settings now expose Gemini Nano connector mode switching so QA can swap between AICore TODO contract, QA fake connector and legacy stub without code changes, while also surfacing provider/session-factory status.
Routes text classification requests through selected vendor adapter and falls back to bundled TFLite when unavailable.
Gemini Nano boundary now exposes structured connector contracts above provider and session-factory layers so future AICore / OEM binding can be swapped without changing UI/router code.

v6.6 starts the real Android AICore/Gemini Nano binding through ML Kit Prompt API: provider diagnostics now include Prompt availability, session factory opens a real on-device session when FeatureStatus is AVAILABLE, and settings now expose in-app download/retry UX for DOWNLOADABLE and DOWNLOADING states.

v6.6 keeps the split provider layout and adds AiCoreFeatureFlagProbe so provider diagnostics combine OS capability, Prompt API availability, download progress, retry state, and entitlement gating before opening a real session.
v6.6 keeps the GeminiNanoInferenceTrace ring buffer and now reuses the same trace schema for both fake session inference and real ML Kit Prompt-based AICore session inference.

v6.6 keeps the split session-factory layout and upgrades AiCoreTodoSessionFactoryV2 to open a real ML Kit Prompt session when AVAILABLE, while surfacing DOWNLOADABLE/DOWNLOADING/retry state in diagnostics and preserving deterministic QA trace instrumentation.
Deterministic fake Gemini Nano connector for QA and demos. Produces safe/caution/fraud locally without vendor SDK or network.
Gemini Nano adapter now resolves connector mode dynamically and consumes provider-backed connectors, while preserving connector-specific model_source values and safe TFLite fallback.
Placeholder adapter for Qualcomm AI Engine / QNN integration with safe fallback path.
Placeholder adapter for Samsung Gauss runtime integration with safe fallback path.
